html:
Exclusive to:  

Coffee Beans are Fruit Food items introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They can be harvested from Coffee Plants. When eaten, they restore 9.375 . Coffee Beans spoil in 6 Days and can be used in the Crock Pot and provide 0.5 fruit value.

Contents

  • 1 Roasted Coffee Beans
  • 2 Downloadable Content
  • 3 Tips
  • 4 Usage

Roasted Coffee Beans

Roasted Coffee Beans are obtained by cooking Coffee Beans using a source of fire, such as a Campfire. When consumed, Roasted Coffee Beans increase the speed of the consumer by 5 (normal character speed is 6) for 30 seconds. They also reduce Sanity by 5. Roasted Coffee Beans spoil in 15 days.

While they can be eaten directly or used in the Crock Pot as a filler or fruit ingredient, their main purpose is to cook Coffee. Coffee requires Roasted Coffee Beans, using raw Coffee Beans in the recipe will yield Fist Full of Jam.

Downloadable Content

Coffee Beans are also present in the Hamlet DLC, however, they cannot be harvested from plants. Instead, raw ones can be bought for 2 Oincs each at the Curly Tails Mud Spa in the Pig City.

Tips

  • Similar to Monster Meat, the cooked version of Coffee Beans lasts 250% longer. It is therefore advised to cook it as soon as possible before storing it for later use. This also prevents the player from accidentally using raw Coffee Beans when trying to make Coffee.

Usage

“They could use some roasting.”
–Wilson, when examining Coffee Beans.
“These could use fire.”
–Willow, when examining Coffee Beans.
“Tiny beans give Wolfgang strength!”
–Wolfgang, when examining Coffee Beans.
“These look stimulating.”
–Wendy, when examining Coffee Beans.
“DRINKABLE BEANS”
–WX-78, when examining Coffee Beans.
“Very high in caffeine.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Coffee Beans.
“I should cook these up.”
–Woodie, when examining Coffee Beans.
“It's strange to see them this color.”
–Maxwell, when examining Coffee Beans.
“I will need to roast it before I can consume it without ill effect.”
–Wagstaff, when examining Coffee Beans.
“I take mine black.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Coffee Beans.
“These smell very... adult.”
–Webber, when examining Coffee Beans.
“Come to mama!”
–Walani, when examining Coffee Beans.
“Glorious!”
–Warly, when examining Coffee Beans.
“Just add water.”
–Woodlegs, when examining Coffee Beans.
“BEANS O' ZOOMINGS”
–Wilba, when examining Coffee Beans.
“Zoomberries!”
–Wormwood, when examining Coffee Beans.
“Small enough to fit in the Pew-matic.”
–Wheeler, when examining Coffee Beans.
Coffee Beans are Fruit Food items introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. They can be harvested from Coffee Plants. When eaten, they restore 9.375 . Coffee Beans spoil in 6 Days and can be used in the Crock Pot and provide 0.5 fruit value.

Roasted Coffee Beans[edit | edit source]
“Heat definitely improved them.”
–Wilson, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Ahhh, that aroma.”
–Willow, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Is bitter beans!”
–Wolfgang, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Who knew the will to live came in bean form?”
–Wendy, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“NARCOTIC BEAN HAS REACHED OPTIMUM ROAST LEVEL”
–WX-78, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Ahh, that roast smells delightful.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Canadians love their coffee.”
–Woodie, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Better than raw, but perhaps there's a better way to prepare them?”
–Maxwell, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Has an ephemeral effect on my adrenal gland.”
–Wagstaff, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“It smells energizing.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“These make me feel funny.”
–Webber, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Peppy!”
–Walani, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Could use hot water...!”
–Warly, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“No hot water?”
–Woodlegs, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“FWOOSH'DED BEANS O' ZOOMINGS”
–Wilba, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“Smells good.”
–Wormwood, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.
“I eat these all the time during overnight flights.”
–Wheeler, when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.

Coffee Beans are also present in the Hamlet DLC, however, they cannot be harvested from plants. Instead, raw ones can be bought for 2 Oincs each at the Curly Tails Mud Spa in the Pig City.

'''Coffee Beans''' are [[Fruit]] [[Food]] items introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. They can be harvested from [[Coffee Plant]]s. When eaten, they restore 9.375 {{Hunger}}. Coffee Beans [[spoil]] in 6 [[Day]]s and can be used in the [[Crock Pot]] and provide 0.5 fruit value.

==Roasted Coffee Beans==
{{Quotes
|wilson = Heat definitely improved them.
|willow = Ahhh, that aroma.
|wolfgang = Is bitter beans!
|wendy = Who knew the will to live came in bean form?

|source = when examining Roasted Coffee Beans.}}'''Roasted Coffee Beans''' are obtained by [[cooking]] Coffee Beans using a source of [[fire]], such as a [[Campfire]]. When consumed, Roasted Coffee Beans increase the speed of the consumer by 5 (normal [[character]] speed is 6) for 30 seconds. They also reduce [[Sanity]] by 5. Roasted Coffee Beans spoil in 15 days.

While they can be eaten directly or used in the Crock Pot as a filler or fruit ingredient, their main purpose is to cook [[Coffee]]. Coffee requires Roasted Coffee Beans, using raw Coffee Beans in the recipe will yield [[Fist Full of Jam]].

==[[File:Gift Icon.png|32px]] Downloadable Content ==
Coffee Beans are also present in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, however, they cannot be harvested from plants. Instead, raw ones can be bought for 2 [[Oinc]]s each at the [[Curly Tails Mud Spa]] in the [[Pig City]].

== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips==
* Similar to [[Monster Meat]], the cooked version of Coffee Beans lasts 250% longer. It is therefore advised to cook it as soon as possible before storing it for later use. This also prevents the player from accidentally using raw Coffee Beans when trying to make Coffee.
